case_title: LARRY BUCK VS. ROBIN SOLIS ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF BUCK, LARRY
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY BUCK, LARRY AS TO DEFENDANT SOLIS, ROBIN HILL, EUGENE ARMSTRONG, JOHN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-30-2021 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $75.00) SERVED AUG-04-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HILL, EUGENE

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF LARRY BUCK IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT EUGENE HILL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS ROBIN SOLIS AND JOHN ARMSTRONG ARE NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT EUGENE HILL STATES THAT HE WAS NOT PROPERLY SERVED. CLAIM WAS SERVED TO AN ADDRESS OF DEFENDANTS FORMER PLACE OF EMPLOYMENT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SWORN DECLARATION OF ROBIN SOLIS ***RECEIVED AFTER 8:30AM THE SET HEARING** FILED BY DEFENDANT SOLIS, ROBIN
REMARK:RETURN MAIL RECD 4/18/22. ORDER OF DISMISSAL MAILED TO ROBIN SOLIS-NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $75.00) SERVED AUG-07-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SOLIS, ROBIN
